decisions.title: Scale Production Database Infrastructure
decisions.context: RDS scaling requests for both prod (ENG-8424) and gov read replica (ENG-9131) indicate capacity constraints. Need to decide on instance types and timing to minimize disruption while supporting growth.

arguments.for: Performance degradation risks customer experience and decisions captured; gov compliance requires separate consideration
arguments.against: Cost increase; potential need for maintenance window coordination

decisions.title: DLv3 Alert Infrastructure Migration Complete
decisions.context: Multiple DLv3 alert routing issues (ENG-9058, ENG-9091, ENG-9169) suggest alert infrastructure needs finalization. Decision needed on cutover timeline and rollback strategy.
decisions.blockedBy: Alert routing configuration not terminating correctly; grpc-internal-errors not re-routing

arguments.for: Critical for operational visibility as DLv3 becomes primary data layer; reduces noise in main channels
arguments.against: Current routing bugs could cause missed alerts during transition

decisions.title: Python Client ABAC API Release Timing
decisions.context: ENG-7055 updating Python client with new ABAC APIs. Ties to 'Embed Deeper' pillar. Need to decide on beta vs GA release and customer communication strategy.

arguments.for: Enables programmatic access control for Python Rules users; supports enterprise security requirements
arguments.against: Needs thorough testing and documentation before broad release

decisions.title: Sift Edge Simulator Enhancement Priority
decisions.context: ENG-9157 proposes adding variation to simulator data. Supports 'Build the Moat' by improving edge testing capabilities. Prioritize vs other Edge work?

arguments.for: Better testing = more reliable edge deployments; demonstrates edge maturity to prospects
arguments.against: Resource allocation away from core Edge features or customer-facing work

decisions.title: Read Replica Strategy for Data Layer Objects
decisions.context: ENG-8828 exploring read replicas for datalayer objects. Could significantly reduce primary DB load. Decide on scope and rollout phases.

arguments.for: Reduces load on primary; improves read performance; supports scaling 'Decisions Captured'
arguments.against: Adds complexity; eventual consistency considerations for some queries

keyResults.name: Ask SIFT Query Volume (per active user/week)

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy infrastructure work (DB scaling, alerting, DLv3 migration) consuming 40% of eng capacity. Customer-facing feature work (Explore UX, Canvas) at 25%. Technical debt paydown (alert noise, observability) at 35%.
alerts: Infrastructure decisions (DB scaling, DLv3 alerts) blocking downstream work
Multiple data import/quality issues suggest systemic gap in 'Nail the Core'
Sift Edge work fragmented across simulator, alerting, deployment - needs unified sprint focus

events.title: Tabletop Exercise Readiness
events.description: ENG-9179: Checklist must be complete before tabletop. Tests incident response for DLv3 migration.

events.title: EKS Cluster Deployment
events.description: ENG-9165: New cluster for workload isolation. Supports scaling strategy.

events.title: DB Scaling Decision Gate
events.description: Finalize prod RDS (ENG-8424) and gov replica (ENG-9131) instance types and migration plan.

events.title: DLv3 Alert Migration Complete

events.title: Sift Edge Simulator Enhancement Review
events.description: ENG-9157: Decide priority vs other Edge work. Input to Q2 planning.

events.title: Python ABAC API Release Decision
events.description: ENG-7055: Beta vs GA, customer comms strategy, documentation readiness.

events.title: Read Replica Strategy Finalized
events.description: ENG-8828: Scope, rollout phases, consistency model for datalayer object reads.

events.title: Data Import Quality Review
events.description: ENG-9150 (Parquet enums), ENG-7918 (Job IDs), FD-40 (exports). Assess systemic improvements needed.

events.title: Q1 Strategy Review: Decisions Captured
events.description: Assess North Star progress. Input to Q2 OKRs. Review pillar health and resource allocation.

events.title: Job Observability Rollout Complete
events.description: ENG-9002, ENG-9025: Graceful lifecycle, rollback, metrics. 95% coverage target for Build the Moat KR.
